name: TW Weekly Disbursement Bank
html:
{%- set bank_entries = [] -%} {%- for row in (doc.disbursement_entries or []) -%} {%- if row.payment_method and 'Bank' in row.payment_method -%} {%- set _ = bank_entries.append(row) -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- set total_amt = namespace(val=0) -%} {%- for row in bank_entries -%}{%- set total_amt.val = total_amt.val + (row.net_amount or 0) -%}{%- endfor -%} {%- set debit_no = frappe.db.get_value('Bank Account', {'account': doc.payment_account}, 'bank_account_no') or doc.payment_account.split(' - ')[0] -%}

Total Beneficiaries: {{ bank_entries | length }}
Total Amount: {{ frappe.format(total_amt.val, {"fieldtype": "Currency"}) }}
